title: fumaria muralis var. major
intro: Fumaria muralis var. major, also known as wall fumitory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). Traditionally, wall fumitory has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of wall fumitory include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of wall fumitory can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
